channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: England end Mexico's World Cup with best win on fo...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Outside of England, the Three Lions' World Cup history is mixed at best, but they defied the odds to grind out an emotional last-16 win over Mexico.

item.title: Security foundation of a prosperous society, Fubara asserts
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Governor Fubara highlights Rivers security as the vital foundation for a prosperous society, commending the Nigerian Army’s role in maintaining peace and s
Read More: https://punchng.com/security-foundation-of-a-prosperous-society-fubara-asserts/

item.title: Justice with an asterisk: Two things can be true a...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: For USMNT fans, seeing Folarin Balogun play against Belgium after FIFA rescinded his suspension will feel a bit odd -- a jumble of joy tinged with a heavy slice of unease.

item.title: Lingfield, Wolverhampton and Ripon feature today
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Lingfield, Wolverhampton and Ripon are the venues for today's Flat action - live on Sky Sports Racing.

item.title: '**** unbelievable!' | NEW ANGLE of Verstappen's race-impacting crash
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: POV of Max Verstappen's race-impacting crash on lap 48 of the British GP.

item.title: Tottenham sign Tonali for club record $125M fee
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Tottenham have shattered their transfer record for the second time this summer after agreeing a deal worth up to £100m ($133m) to sign Sandro Tonali from Newcastle United.

item.title: UEFA: FIFA crossed 'red line' on Balogun ban
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: UEFA have strongly criticised FIFA's decision to suspend USMNT striker Folarin Balogun's red card, thus allowing the United States striker to be available for the World Cup round-of-16 match against Belgium.

item.title: England survive to beat Mexico in Azteca thriller
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: England survived a raucous Azteca Stadium atmosphere and a red card early in the second half to prevail past co-hosts Mexico 3-2 in a thrilling World Cup round-of-16 clash in Mexico City on Sunday.

item.title: Belgium furious at Balogun U-turn: It's April Fool...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Belgium coach Rudi Garcia said he thought it was a joke when he first heard news that suspended United States striker Folarin Balogun was cleared to play in the Americans' round-of-16 match.

item.title: FIFA suspends Balogun red card, can face Belgium
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: FIFA has suspended the red card U.S. striker Folarin Balogun received in the team's match against Bosnia-Herzegovina, making him available to face Belgium in the round of 16 at the World Cup.

item.title: Mexico proud, but 'hurt' after exiting World Cup
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Mexico manager Javier Aguirre said he feels proud but hurt after being eliminated from the FIFA World Cup with a 3-2 loss against England on Sunday night at the Estadio Azteca.

item.title: Tearful Neymar retires from Brazil after WC exit
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: An emotional Neymar said his career with Brazil had "finished" after his team's World Cup exit at the hands of Norway in the round of 16 on Sunday.

item.title: Ronaldo: 'This will be my last World Cup'
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo has admitted that this will be his last World Cup, as he prepares to face Spain with Portugal in Monday's round of 16 clash in Dallas.

item.title: 🏆2026-27 UCL season begins mid-World Cup
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The new Champions League campaign begins 38 days after last season's final. Plenty of unheralded clubs are involved, all with their own fascinating stories.

item.title: NPFL: Kano Pillars Begin Preparations For New Season, Aim For Strong Campaign
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Kano Pillars have officially commenced preparations for the 2026/2027 Nigeria Premier Football League, NPFL, season. The Sai Masu Gida held their first training session of pre-season at the Sani Abacha Stadium, Kano, on Monday morning. The opening session was conducted by the club’s technical

item.title: Namibia: VIP Protection Chief Removed After State House Security Breach
item.dc:creator: AllAfrica
item.description: [Namibian] The head of the police's VIP protection unit, commissioner Michael Abraham, has been removed from his position following a security breach at State House involving an unauthorised intruder.

item.dc:creator: AllAfrica
item.description: [Independent (Kampala)] Kampala -- President Museveni has defended the government's opposition to granting bail to some opposition figures facing criminal charges

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph

DSP Timfon John, Police Public Relations Officer, told journalists on Monday

item.title: 15 Killed, 17 others injured in early morning auto crash in Kwara
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: At least 15 people lost their lives, while 17 others were seriously injured in a fatal lone trailer crash along the Ogbomoso-Oloru highway at Oko-Olowo axis in Ilorin South Local Government Area of Kwara State. The fatal crash occurred at about 2:32 a.m. on Monday near the Muslim Cemetery

item.title: How England used five mini games to beat Mexico
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: The tactical breakdown of how Thomas Tuchel's 10-man England pulled off a remarkable World Cup win in a hostile Mexico City.

item.title: Gov Adeleke, Osun APC renew dispute over security after IGP’s fact-finding visit
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Osun State Governor, Ademola Adeleke and the All Progressives Congress, APC, have renewed their exchange over security and policing in the state. item.description: Portugal captain Cristiano Ronaldo has confirmed that the 2026 FIFA World Cup will be the final tournament of his illustrious international career. The post Ronaldo Confirms 2026 World Cup Will Be His Last appeared first on Trending News.

item.title: NANS issues ultimatum to South African business interests in Nigeria

item.description: Okereafor, in a statement issued in Enugu said that after the expiration of the ultimatum, South African business interests would face the wrath of the more than 43.1 million Nigerian students scattered over the country.

item.title: Brookfield’s Data Center Firm Csquare Seeks $1.35 Billion in IPO
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Csquare Inc., a data center company backed by Brookfield Corp., is seeking to raise as much as $1.35 billion in a US initial public offering.

item.title: The numbers behind Spain defence chasing World Cup history
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: With Spain yet to concede at the 2026 World Cup and on the brink of another tournament record, BBC Sport examines the numbers behind the shutouts.

item.title: Why I faked my own kidnap for N25m — Delta man
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: A Delta State-based man, Michael James, has explained why he allegedly staged his own kidnap and demanded N25 million from his family, saying The post Why I faked my own kidnap for N25m — Delta man appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: ‘Mini-grids Attracting Huge Private Capital, De-risking Power Sector’
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Managing Director of the Rural Electrification Agency (REA), Dr Abba Aliyu, has said that mini-grids are no longer just household rural electrification projects, they now represent a highly viable commercial model for electricity delivery capable of de-risking Nigeria’s power sector and at

item.title: PFIPC Scandal: Fagbemi names top government officials who should be suspended
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A political scientist and analyst, Dr Kunle Fagbemi, has named certain top government officials who should be placed on administrative leave over the contentious fake agency saga involving Femi Gbajabiamila, Chief of Staff to President Bola Tinubu. Speaking during an interview on Arise Television&#8

item.title: 2026 World Cup: You’ve crossed a red line – UEFA blasts FIFA over Balogun decision
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: UEFA has hit out at FIFA, for suspending the red card shown to US striker, Folarin Balogun. Balogun was sent off against Bosnia and Herzegovina and was set to serve a one-match ban. But on Sunday, FIFA announced that he would be eligible to play against Belgium in their last-32 clash. This u-tu

item.title: Temi Otedola Opens Up On Family Privileges
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Nigerian actress and media personality Temi Otedola has openly acknowledged the privileges that come with being born into one of Nigeria’s wealthiest families. Speaking on an episode of the ‘How Far Podcast’, which she co-hosts with her husband, Mr Eazi, Temi addressed the trend of nepot
